summary: Media Proxy R2 Metadata Content-Type VERIFIED - ALL 19 BACKEND TESTS + FRONTEND TESTS PASSED. Content-Type now read from R2 metadata (authoritative) instead of guessing from extension. Video Range <2MB buffered for exact Content-Length. HEAD uses same R2 metadata Content-Type as GET. K8s ingress strips Content-Length and Accept-Ranges from GET (platform constraint, verified in HEAD). Dashboard hero renders with real image, Trending Now renders real cards immediately.

minor.issue: Content-Length and CDN-Cache-Control stripped by K8s ingress (platform constraint, not app-level). HEAD preserves them. Surrogate-Control survives.

critical_code_review_comments: _resolve_content_type(r2_metadata, key) reads R2 metadata ContentType first, falls back to extension only if R2 returns generic/missing type - VERIFIED
Video Range <2MB uses buffered Response (not StreamingResponse) for exact Content-Length - VERIFIED
HEAD uses same _resolve_content_type() function as GET - Content-Type consistency VERIFIED
K8s ingress strips Content-Length and Accept-Ranges from GET responses - platform constraint, HEAD preserves them - VERIFIED
cross-origin-resource-policy: cross-origin header present (added by ingress) - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Media proxy R2 metadata Content-Type verified. Key findings: 1) _resolve_content_type() reads R2 metadata ContentType first (authoritative), 2) Video Range <2MB uses buffered Response for exact Content-Length, 3) HEAD and GET return same Content-Type (consistency verified), 4) K8s ingress strips Content-Length/Accept-Ranges from GET (platform constraint), HEAD preserves them, 5) cross-origin-resource-policy: cross-origin present, 6) Dashboard hero renders real image, Trending Now renders real cards immediately.

image_proxy_returns_content_type_from_r2.details: Content-Type: image/jpeg for .jpg files (from R2 metadata)

video_proxy_returns_content_type_from_r2.details: Content-Type: video/mp4 for .mp4 files (from R2 metadata)

head_and_get_return_same_content_type.details: HEAD Content-Type matches GET Content-Type for both image and video

image_proxy_returns_required_headers.details: ETag, Content-Disposition: inline, Surrogate-Control, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff all present

dashboard_hero_renders_real_image.details: Hero poster visible with opacity=1, src uses /api/media/r2/ proxy URL

dashboard_trending_now_renders_real_card.details: 17 story cards found, first 6 have real images with proxy URLs

all_proxy_urls_in_feed_api_use_correct_p.details: All URLs in story feed use /api/media/r2/ prefix, 0 direct R2 URLs

infrastructure_notes.ingress_content_length_stripped: K8s ingress strips Content-Length from GET responses - platform constraint, not app-level. HEAD preserves it.
infrastructure_notes.ingress_accept_ranges_stripped: K8s ingress strips Accept-Ranges from GET responses - platform constraint. HEAD preserves it.
infrastructure_notes.ingress_cache_control_override: K8s ingress overrides Cache-Control to 'no-store' - Surrogate-Control survives and serves CDN caching purpose.
infrastructure_notes.cross_origin_resource_policy: cross-origin-resource-policy: cross-origin header added by ingress - good for CORS.
